race.description: Seymour Park - Stud Hand Appreciation Hcp (Bm62)
race.comment: HIGH TEMPO (4) gets the nod. She's a consistent mare who continues to front up and run well, well backed last start at Sale on heavy ground when battling into fifth. The second to Amleto prior at Ballarat is great form for this and with any luck from the wide gate she'll go close. SALT SPRAY (10) has been off his form in recent times but has been contesting much stronger contests. The 7th at Flemington two back reads very well for this. Go close. THE CHARLATAN (6) broke through for his maiden win over 1590m at Wangaratta last time, scoring by 4 lengths in impressive style. Have to respect and up in trip should only suit better. DURBAN HARBOUR (2) worked home well at Caulfield Heath last time for fourth and should be ready to peak third up. TIMEONLEES (11) bolted in on very heavy going two back and warrants respect.
